metrics.label: Delegation clarity
metrics.description: How clearly the task divides into actionable roles or steps.

metrics.label: Clarification pressure
metrics.description: How many follow-up questions are still obviously required before execution.

metrics.label: Artifact specificity
metrics.description: How specific and reviewable the expected outputs are.

metrics.label: Operator confidence
metrics.description: How inspectable the task shape is before execution widens.

metrics.label: Adoption overhead
metrics.description: How much extra implementation burden the lane introduces for an external team.
